title: cephalocereus polygonus
intro: Cephalocereus polygonus, also known as the octopus cactus or eight-angled columnar cactus, is a species of cactus native to Mexico and is characterized by its unique eight-angled stems. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cephalocereus polygonus include its ability to reduce swelling, improve wound healing, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the stems and leaves, and then using them to create teas, infusions, or topical creams for medicinal purposes.
